untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on calendar-based entry/exit timing (mid-April entry, end-of-April exit) and contract expiration mechanics (May gasoline futures contract), which cannot be expressed using the allowed technical indicators and operators. The rule requires temporal logic (specific month/date checking) and futures contract selection logic that are not supported by the technical indicator framework.
translation_notes: This is a pure seasonal/calendar-based trade, not a technical signal. It requires: (1) Calendar month filtering (April only), (2) Intra-month timing (mid-April ~day 15), (3) Contract expiration selection (May contract), and (4) Fixed exit timing (end-of-April ~day 30). These temporal constraints fall outside the scope of technical indicator-based backtest rules. Implementation would require custom date/contract logic in the backtest engine.
